text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Chiyooo! I read through the notebook you gave
me!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
It was chock-full of hip and young sayings—I
loved it!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
I've been trying to study "cutting-edge" language,
as you call it. Were there any mistakes I made?

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Nope, that notebook was the bomb!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
"Too many chill pills and you'll accomplish nil."
"Make your move while you're in the groove."

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
All of these sayings are rad, fly, and kickin'!
They're just like you, Chiyo—totally tubular! ♪

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: No, thank you for this wonderful birthday present, Chiyo. ♪

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: You're welcome... I'm just glad you really like it!
